title: Add manifest annotate endpoint
body:
Adds manifest annotate endpoint and enables tunnel mode

Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body:

@rhatdan initially you were dead set against this endpoint, which is why it was not initially implemented.  I do not remember why exactly.  Firstly, have you changed your mind?

Ok thanks for reminding me.  In this case this is modification of an existing manifest correct? 
Lets talk at standup.
